creator: bf1783@gmail.com
text:
I prepared such an update at the beginning of this month, but I found
that the new version of asdf bundled with sbcl breaks a number of
dependent ports (buildapp and stumpwm) and is newer than the version
found in cl-asdf (which needs to be updated), so I postponed the
update until I could discuss the problem with olgeni@.  Also, I'd like
the next update to use the version of sbcl that is scheduled for
release in a few days.

Jimmy, do you have any plans for updates to the cl-* ports?

Regards,
            b.
